document_api_meta.title: Get User Portraits
document_api_meta.env_desc: This API gets the user portrait of live room

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The creator access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 1. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a362dccb8030ea6f98c) to get creator access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^type
response_param.desc:
The stats_type describes the type of value below.

USER_PORTRAIT_GENDER_UNKNOWN: The user portrait of the unknown gender

USER_PORTRAIT_GENDER_M: The user portrait of the man

USER_PORTRAIT_GENDER_F: The user portrait of the female

response_param.name: ^^type
response_param.desc:
The stats_type describes the type of value below.

USER_PORTRAIT_FOLLOWER: The user portrait of the follower

USER_PORTRAIT_NON_FOLLOWER: The user portrait of the non follower

response_param.name: ^^type
response_param.desc:
The stats_type describes the type of value below.

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_LESS_THAN_15: The user portrait whose age is less than 15

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_MORE_THAN_34: The user portrait whose age is less than 34

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_MORE_THAN_55: The user portrait whose age is less than 55

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_13_TO_17: The user portrait whose age is between 13 and 17

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_15_TO_17: The user portrait whose age is between 15 and 17

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_18_TO_24: The user portrait whose age is between 18 and 24

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_25_TO_34: The user portrait whose age is between 25 and 34

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_35_TO_44: The user portrait whose age is between 35 and 44

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_45_TO_54: The user portrait whose age is between 45 and 54

response_param.name: ^^value
response_param.desc: The share rate of region, times 10,000

response_param.name: ^paid_ads_age_indicators
response_param.desc: Paid advertisement age indicators for advertisement

response_param.name: ^^type
response_param.desc:
The stats_type describes the type of value below.

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_LESS_THAN_15: The user portrait whose age is less than 15

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_MORE_THAN_34: The user portrait whose age is less than 34

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_MORE_THAN_55: The user portrait whose age is less than 55

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_13_TO_17: The user portrait whose age is between 13 and 17

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_15_TO_17: The user portrait whose age is between 15 and 17

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_18_TO_24: The user portrait whose age is between 18 and 24

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_25_TO_34: The user portrait whose age is between 25 and 34

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_35_TO_44: The user portrait whose age is between 35 and 44

USER_PORTRAIT_AGE_45_TO_54: The user portrait whose age is between 45 and 54

response_param.name: ^paid_ads_gender_indicators
response_param.desc: Paid advertisement gender indicators for advertisement

response_param.name: ^^type
response_param.desc:
The stats_type describes the type of value below.

USER_PORTRAIT_GENDER_UNKNOWN: The user portrait of the unknown gender

USER_PORTRAIT_GENDER_M: The user portrait of the man

USER_PORTRAIT_GENDER_F: The user portrait of the female

response_param.name: ^^type
response_param.desc:
The stats_type describes the type of value below.

USER_PORTRAIT_FOLLOWER: The user portrait of the follower

USER_PORTRAIT_NON_FOLLOWER: The user portrait of the non follower

error_code_list.msg: Invalid param. Please check room id.
